raw.title: Limiting Not Just Screen Time, But Screen Space
raw.excerpt: The post Limiting Not Just Screen Time, But Screen Space appeared first on NOEMA.

llm_processed.summary: The article reflects on the erosion of privacy due to digital technology and explores how reclaiming physical space can foster ecological mindfulness and reduce tech overreach.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects digital detox practices to regenerative economics by framing technology use as a resource allocation issue.
